question: In the opening logo animation, which specific word is underlined by a yellow line? A. Fine B. TV C. Dining D. Ramsay
How many planters containing bushes are arranged in a row outside the building?
What color is the double-breasted chef's jacket worn by the woman speaking? A. Black B. Beige C. White D. Red
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A white ceramic plate with a textured rim holds a pale yellow ravioli centered on a pool of smooth green sauce. A thin ring of glossy brown sauce surrounds the green base. Dark black caviar tops the dumpling alongside a small green leaf and a tiny red petal. Text overlays identify the dish as lobster ravioli.

question: How many pink flowers are visible in the vase?

Woman with light brown hair pulled back, wearing a white double-breasted chef's coat D. White ceramic plate with a textured rim, containing a single pale yellow dumpling

Describe the sequence of visual scenes and text overlays shown in the first 20 seconds of the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the Fine Dining TV logo appears with a yellow underline; at 6s, a lobster ravioli dish is shown with title text; at 10s, the exterior of the restaurant building is displayed; at 14s, Chef Clare Smyth speaks with her name overlay; at 18s, the video cuts back to the plated dish.

What final preparation step is applied to the plated dish the chef is holding?
canonical_answer: Green sauce is poured from a white pitcher around the pasta dumpling.
